_comment: Edit this file to update your site text, then run `npm run build`. Plain text only — no HTML needed. Lists are arrays; add/remove items freely. For a photo: drop an image into the assets/ folder and set "photo" to its path, e.g. "assets/norm.jpg". Leave it "" for no photo.
name: Norman Chella
metaDescription: Norm in a nutshell — interviewer, community builder, podcaster. Host of Podlovers Asia, RoamFM, AntiFool, Tempered Fables and more.
title: This is Norm.
about: Hi there — welcome to my business card.
**My name is Norman T. Chella.** I interview people, build communities, and create things. I'm the host of Podlovers Asia, RoamFM, AntiFool, Tempered Fables, and other shows.
I'm a big believer in ==podcasting==, ==knowledge work==, and ==polymathic thinking==. I read far and wide.
currently: Podcast Librarian at Podchaser — keeping up to date with credits and new podcasts, and building a relationship with every podcaster in the world. My role is to immortalise your work.
SuperLearner Certified Coach in memory and speed-reading techniques — helping high-performance autodidacts build Memory Palaces, train imagination, and remember everything.
previously: Ex-Head of Marketing at a Japanese FinTech company · Chief of Business Development at Renegade Radio, Malaysia's premium podcasting network · Science Communications Director for the Planetary Health Lab, University of Edinburgh.

whyHowWhat.why: I discover and share wisdom from all sources so we can better understand the world and each other.
whyHowWhat.how: Regular self-introspection, asking questions to understand, and learning across many fields.
whyHowWhat.what: Podcasting, writing, consulting, and coaching. I'm a digital marketer specialising in content and outreach.

shows.name: Tempered Fables
shows.meta: Fictional short stories · part of Eterna

workWith.label: Improve memory & speed-reading — let me be your coach
